name: Cabbage Potatoes & Peas Molagootal
recipeIngredient: Shredded dry coconut soaked in a little water
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the mung dal in about 2 cups of water and a touch of turmeric until it is three-quarters done.
2. Add shredded cabbage, diced potatoes, and a little more water if needed on top of the dal.
3. Stir in sambar powder and salt.
4. Cover with a lid and let it simmer for another 10 to 15 minutes. Veggies should be done but still holding their shape.
5. Stir in wet coconut.
6. Remove from heat.
7. Top with seasoning as explained in previous recipes, or grind fresh coconut with roasted red chili and roasted urad dal paste if preferred.
